[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011000 2
1 0010001 2
2 0010101 3
3 0110100 3
4 0111111 6
5 0101111 5
6 0100010 2
7 0111111 6

01 10 0100100 2
12 21 0100010 2 match 6
23 32 0100010 2 match 6
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0011000 2 match 0
56 65 0010000 1
67 76 0010001 2 match 1
70 07 0010100 2

02 20 0100000 1
13 31 0100010 2 match 6
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0010001 2 match 1
57 75 0010000 1
60 06 0010000 1
71 17 0000101 2

03 30 0100000 1
14 41 0001101 3
25 52 0000000 a
36 63 0000000 a
47 74 0010101 3 match 2
50 05 0010000 1
61 16 0000001 1
72 27 0000000 a

04 40 0010100 2
15 51 0001000 1
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0000000 a
